rows.label: qev012406_MSG0001
rows.name:
Thank you. I'll never forget you
for the rest of my life. Your name
has been engraved in my history.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev012406_MSG0002
rows.name:
I really can't stand Ciska's sloppy
and irresponsible attitude, but I'll
manage somehow from here on out.[ST:wait ]
